reasoning: Koren, today we'll focus on your poor lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base, building on your last ride. We target these elements by using the Emigration Canyon for its extended climbs simulating the Alpine Loop. Our goal today is to improve your fatigue resistance and power sustainability over long climbs, looking directly at the key power drop from 5 to 20 minutes.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Begin with 5 mins at 201W, then jump to 3 mins at 242W, repeat 4 times. Finish with a sustained effort at 218W for 15 mins.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
